description: Pokemon GO 1500 CP Great League team used as architectural harness example. Three members each map to a domain-function constraint layer and serve as the long-running reference for custom asset batches.

members.domain_function: long-running stability, bulk, persistence, fail-closed anchor
members.transistor_role: arms — holds signal state across the full buildup window
members.struggle_scenario: energy generation lag — Bastiodon's slow Smack Down accumulates energy across the full buildup window before the drop is viable

members.domain_function: fast signal emission, high-throughput scanning, energy accumulation before drop
members.transistor_role: emits — fires probe signals during the buildup window; primes the drop
members.struggle_scenario: Incinerate's channel window — 5-turn fast move creates timing vulnerability; probes must be designed around the fixed emission cadence

members.domain_function: cross-domain calls, multi-type coverage, collaboration scenarios
members.transistor_role: fires — executes the drop zone burst after transistor gates are armed by Bastiodon and Talonflame
members.struggle_scenario: type overlap — Grass and Dragon share vulnerability to Ice; integration calls must route around the double-weakness window

quantization_zones.buildup: steps 0-43 per cycle (44 steps, gradual ramp 0.1->0.7)
quantization_zones.silence: steps 44-47 per cycle (4 steps, deliberate pause)
quantization_zones.drop: steps 48-67 per cycle (20 steps, full intensity 1.0)

deliverables.description: Deployment manifest, harness team spec, scenario docs
SKILL.md + references for personalization, cross-reference, and team contract
Agent-facing SKILL.md for harness autonomous operation
TypeScript MCP server — agentic autonomous loop, 13 tools, wraps Python harness pipeline
